url.description: The URL of the Shopware instance

compatibility_date.description: Controls date-based compatibility behavior, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.

disable_composer_scripts.description: When enabled, composer scripts will be disabled during CI builds

disable_composer_install.description: When enabled, composer install will be skipped during CI builds

disable_asset_copy.description: When enabled, the assets will not be copied to the public folder

remove_extension_assets.description: When enabled, the assets of extensions will be removed from the extension public folder. (Requires Shopware 6.5.2.0)

keep_extension_source.description: When enabled, the extensions source code will be keep in the final build

keep_source_maps.description: When enabled, the source maps will not be removed from the final build

cleanup_paths.description: Paths to delete for the final build

browserslist.description: Browserslist configuration for the Storefront build

exclude_extensions.description: Extensions to exclude from the build

disable_storefront_build.description: When enabled, the storefront build will be skipped

force_extension_build.description: Extensions to force build for, even if they have compiled files

force_admin_build.description: When enabled, the shopware admin will be built

keep_node_modules.description: Keep following node_modules in the final build

asset_caching.description: When enabled, built assets are cached and restored on subsequent builds when sources haven't changed

hooks.description: Hooks to run at specific points during CI builds

bundles.description: Shopware bundles to include in builds (alternative to composer.json extra.shopware-bundles)

ConfigBuildExtension.description: ConfigBuildExtension defines the configuration for forcing extension builds.

pre.description: Commands to run before anything runs

post.description: Commands to run after everything completes

pre-composer.description: Commands to run before composer install

post-composer.description: Commands to run after composer install

pre-assets.description: Commands to run before asset build

post-assets.description: Commands to run after asset build

ConfigBuildHooks.description: ConfigBuildHooks defines hooks to run at specific points during CI builds.

search_paths.description: Directories to search for MJML files

allow_includes.description:
When enabled, mj-include directives in MJML templates are processed.
MJML 5 ignores mj-include by default for security reasons; set this to
true to opt back in. Each search_path is automatically added to the
mj-include allowlist for files compiled inside it, so templates can
include siblings under the same search_path (e.g. a shared _includes/
folder) without further configuration.

include_paths.description:
Extra directories outside any search_path that mj-include is allowed to
read from. Relative paths are resolved against the project root.
Absolute paths are used as-is. Most projects do not need this — set it
only when partials live outside the search_path tree. Implies
allow_includes.

ConfigBuildMJML.description: ConfigBuildMJML defines the configuration for MJML email template compilation.

extension-management.description: The extension management of the deployment

staging.description: Staging mode configuration for the deployment

title.description: An optional title shown in the deployment output for this step

script.description: The script that is executed for this step

ConfigDeploymentHook.description: Either a single script or a list of steps (a script string or a {title, script} object) executed individually

enabled.description: When enabled, staging setup commands will be executed during installation and upgrade

php.description: PHP configuration for the Docker dev image

profiler.description: Profiler to enable. Possible values: xdebug, blackfire, tideways, pcov, spx.

blackfire_server_id.description: Blackfire server ID from your Blackfire account. Required when profiler is "blackfire".

blackfire_server_token.description: Blackfire server token from your Blackfire account. Required when profiler is "blackfire".

tideways_api_key.description: Tideways API key from your Tideways account. Required when profiler is "tideways".

rewrite.description: Allows to rewrite single columns, perfect for GDPR compliance

nodata.description: Only export the schema of these tables, supports glob wildcards (e.g. "customer*")

ignore.description: Ignore these tables from export, supports glob wildcards (e.g. "customer*")

where.description: Add an where condition to that table, schema is table name as key, and where statement as value

url.description: The URL of the upstream server to proxy requests to when files are not found locally

path.description: Relative path from project root to the bundle directory

name.description: Optional override for the bundle name; defaults to the directory basename

ConfigProjectBundle.description: ConfigProjectBundle defines a project-level Shopware bundle.

php_version.description:
PhpVersion overrides the PHP version used for linting (e.g. "8.4").
When set, this takes precedence over the version derived from composer.json or the static Shopware-to-PHP mapping.

ConfigValidation.description: ConfigValidation is used to configure the project validation.

name.description: The name of the extension to ignore.

identifier.description: The identifier of the item to ignore.

path.description: The path of the item to ignore.

message.description: The message of the item to ignore.

ConfigValidationIgnoreItem.description: ConfigValidationIgnoreItem is used to ignore items from the validation.

ssh.description: SSH connection settings, used when type is "ssh"

path.description: Absolute path on the server where the project is deployed to (contains releases/, shared/ and the current symlink)

keep_releases.description: Amount of releases to keep on the server, defaults to 5

shared_files.description: Files shared between releases, defaults to .env and install.lock

shared_dirs.description: Directories shared between releases, defaults to files, public/media, public/thumbnail, public/sitemap and var/log

exclude.description: Additional paths that are not uploaded to the server (on top of the built-in defaults like .git and node_modules)

EnvironmentDeployment.description: EnvironmentDeployment holds the deployment settings of a remote environment.

build.description: Commands executed locally in the project root before the upload (e.g. shopware-cli project ci .)

pre_switch.description: Commands executed on the server inside the new release before the current symlink is switched. Defaults to running the Shopware Deployment Helper when present

post_switch.description: Commands executed on the server inside the new release after the current symlink was switched

EnvironmentDeploymentHooks.description: EnvironmentDeploymentHooks defines commands executed during a deployment.

host.description: Hostname or IP address of the server

password.description: Password for password based authentication (consider using ${ENV_VAR} substitution instead of a plain value)

identity_file.description: Path to the private key used for authentication. When empty, the SSH agent and default keys (~/.ssh/id_ed25519, ~/.ssh/id_rsa) are tried

passphrase.description: Passphrase for the private key (consider using ${ENV_VAR} substitution instead of a plain value)

known_hosts_file.description: Path to the known_hosts file used for host key verification, defaults to ~/.ssh/known_hosts

insecure_ignore_host_key.description: When enabled, the host key of the server is not verified (insecure)

EnvironmentSSH.description: EnvironmentSSH holds the SSH connection settings of an environment.
